title: Professor Creeps
writer: William Beaudine, Jed Buell, Roy Clements
actors: Mantan Moreland, F.E. Miller, Arthur Ray
plot: Two cut-rate private detectives are broke, hungry and down to their last nickel. They decide to hock their banjo in order to get some money for food, and while one partner is negotiating the deal, the other one falls asleep and dr...
